name: long tunnel
hints: A long tunnel with a valve that has a handle attached. Exits go up and down.
The valve handle here is already attached. TURN VALV to turn it.
U leads to the large room with clay pigeons. D leads to the sewer system.
Turning this valve may affect water flow in the sewer. U=large room (25), D=sewer (28).
notes: Long tunnel connecting large room (25 via U) to sewer system (28 via D). The valve here has its handle attached.
